review_title: Holistic attack surface monitoring and threat detection.
description: The platform has easy integration options with simpler performance tracking and fast on-boarding process. The solution offers a comprehensive view of the threat profile even across a deep and dark web. Their platform is useful in tracking, vendor related threats, brand abuse, security gaps and misconfiguration on time for effective containment and response.
author: Jemis M.
pros: RiskProfiler offers user friendly, easy to access dashboard that makes it continent to keep track of any changes in the threat or security posture. RiskProfiler EASM integrates AI/ML for continuous monitoring and threat detection, helping us improve our response time considerably.
cons: I did not particularly dislike anything about the platform yet.

review_title: A comprehensive threat exposure management solution
description: RiskProfiler’s Threat Exposure Management platform delivers continuous monitoring of internet-facing assets, shadow IT, and misconfigured cloud infrastructure, enabling security teams to take preemptive action.
author: Jassica J.
pros: RiskProfiler enhances the threat detection efforts with real time monitoring. Its intuitive dashboard makes it easy to stay up to date with the security posture in real time.
cons: The module doesn't come with upfront pricing points making the initial decision making process quit challenging.

review_title: Shielding Leadership in Digital Spaces
description: Overall, it added a protective bubble around leadership. For engineers, it meant fewer last-minute escalations because issues were found upstream, not through panicked calls.
author: Guhasri R.
pros: Executive monitoring gave us visibility into forums discussing our leadership by name. It identified fake LinkedIn profiles reaching out to partners, which was both surprising and critical.
cons: The steep learning curve showed up again—executive assistants struggled to interpret dashboards until security staff explained findings.

review_title: Valuable Threat Intelligence For Brand Protection
description: My overall experience with RiskProfiler has been very positive. It gives our teams valuable visibility into external threats, helping us protect brand trust and respond faster.
author: Pranita K.
pros: What I liked most about RiskProfiler was its ability to turn external threat data into actionable intelligence. It helped us track brand abuse, phishing risks, and digital exposure efficiently. It also comes with guided onboarding, and their customer support team has been a great sport.
cons: The platform offers extensive intelligence and workflows, but it takes time to fully understand and use them effectively.

review_title: A Great Tool To Manage External Exposures
description: RiskProfiler changed how we approach visibility and prioritization. The ability to see leaked credentials, brand impersonation attempts, and vendor breaches from one view saves us hours each week. Their team is also incredibly responsive, helping us get from alerts to actions quickly.
author: BALAJI R.
pros: RiskProfiler uncovered external exposures, flagged phishing kits, and monitored our third-party vendors within a unified dashboard with a single panel view. Contextual alerts let us take decisive action fast. The onboarding call was efficient, and our team felt supported throughout the setup. This is the most complete platform we’ve used for external threat defense.
cons: Some notifications overlapped early on before we tuned severity thresholds. Once suppression filters were added, alert fatigue dropped. Initial noise is understandable given how much the platform surfaces by default. Their customer success team helped us structure alerts around business-critical exposures, which really improved day-to-day operational clarity.

review_title: A Living Map of Your External Risk Footprint
description: Setup was quick and required no extra infra. The navigation is intuitive, and even our operations team can make sense of the dashboards. Support is thorough and fast.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The external surface monitoring found rogue assets internal scans missed. The ability to classify and group assets by exposure level makes prioritization easy.
cons: we'd appreciate more automated recommendations for how to remediate flagged assets. UI scalability is solid, but visual density could be better organized for larger inventories.

review_title: Real-time visibility into domain abuse, leaks, and third-party risk
description: RiskProfiler unified our view of digital risk. We now track domain abuse, infrastructure leaks, and third-party breaches in real-time. No jumping between tools. The value became clear in week one, and their team continues to guide us through deeper configuration as we mature. This platform scaled with us easily.
author: Nitesh K.
pros: With RiskProfiler, we consolidated phishing detection, cloud asset visibility, and third-party monitoring into one system. That consolidation helped reduce complexity and budget. Onboarding took just 30 minutes with live help. Every module feeds into the next, and the cross-correlation makes prioritization easy and reporting effortless.
cons: We would love to see mobile-friendly dashboards for exec visibility on the go. While we can share PDFs and email reports, an adaptive UI or lightweight mobile app would add flexibility. We know the team is collecting feedback for roadmap items, and this one feels like an easy win.

review_title: Our analysts rely on it daily, and leadership trusts the reports
description: We’ve gained precision and context in how we detect and triage threats. RiskProfiler bridges gaps across threat types and teams. Our analysts rely on it, and our executives trust the reporting. It’s become foundational to our external threat management program.
author: Utkarsh H.
pros: The platform helped us correlate cloud exposures with leaked credentials and phishing infrastructure targeting our domain. We no longer need to piece data together across systems. The guided onboarding took less than an hour, and the interface is clean once configured. This platform has become part of our daily workflow.
cons: Initial role management felt limited. We struggled with restricting views to specific domains or business units. RiskProfiler’s team provided quick workarounds via tagging and saved filters. We’ve since built better access structures using custom views and the platform’s support for scoped alert subscriptions.

review_title: RiskProfiler helped us go from reactive to proactive in no-time
description: RiskProfiler gave us speed and confidence. From early detection to incident investigation, we’ve become far more proactive. Everything connects: dark web signals, phishing kits, leaked data, and vendor compromise risk. The platform enables fast, informed decision-making, exactly what we needed in a growing attack surface landscape.
author: Mankirat S.
pros: We uncovered typosquat domains, fake portals, and vendor leaks in our first week. RiskProfiler’s modules all talk to each other, so every alert is contextualized. Their support walked us through best practices during setup. The platform is simple to use and packed with the kind of detail our team needs.
cons: We had to adjust some SLA expectations across teams as the volume of surfaced threats increased. RiskProfiler shows the full picture, which can be overwhelming at occasions.

review_title: Strategic Attack Path Mapping with Risk Context
description: RiskProfiler’s attack path visualizations were up and running in 45 minutes. They’ve been central to our quarterly threat review process. Support has been consistent and helpful.
author: Joyjeet D.
pros: The internal and external asset maps are synced with CVE impact scores, making it easier for engineering and security to coordinate fixes. The attack path feature is very well structured.
cons: I don't have much to complain about. But the customization options for the questionnaire set up can be worked on.

review_title: A Simplistic Dashboard View For All External Threat Exposures
description: Riskprofiler dashboard presents the threat data with simplistic graphs and threat points. It can integrate all the cloud service providers for One place threat view.
author: Suyash K.
pros: Riskprofiler offers comprehensive monitoring and threat detection support with robust AI powered features. The solution's EASM & CASM features along with brand risk & supply chain threat management detection capabilities enhances effectivity and quality of response.
cons: We did not find anything to dislike about the product yet. However, we feel the product sometimes glitches with large influx of data.

review_title: Comprehensive external threat view for enhanced security efforts
description: RiskProfiler integrates with number of internal and operational tools for a unified view of business security posture. It also prioritizes the risks based on security and threats score for effective threat response.
author: Darsh L.
pros: RiskProfiler offers comprehensive attack surface visibility for easy identification of external threats for fast mitigation. It also allows detailed view of data breach history, dark web threats, and security gaps.
cons: I did not face any issue with RiskProfiler.

review_title: Vendor performance tracking is easy with RiskProfiler
author: Parth J.
pros: The platform tracks the performance of third-party vendors, providing insights into their adherence to security commitments and service level agreements (SLAs).
cons: It's bit challenging when we use it first time, but it's easy when we can get training from the team.

review_title: Safeguarding Against Phishing Attempts with Brand RiskProfiler
author: Ajay S.
pros: RiskProfiler promotes secure configuration management by identifying and guiding the implementation of best practices for external systems.
cons: RiskProfiler has occasional bugs and glitches in the system

review_title: It has a good customization options
author: Vishal S.
pros: RiskProfiler has a good ease of customization feature to tailor the risk profiler according to individual circumstance.
cons: Need more features in cloud attack surface management.

review_title: From Attack Surface to Supply Chain in One Unified Dashboard
description: It’s allowing us to consolidate external threat monitoring, compliance mapping, and third-party risk into one solution. We no longer rely on disconnected tools for brand threats, external scans, or dark web tracking. This not only cuts costs but also improves threat correlation, speeds up investigations, and aligns our entire security stack.
author: Arunima S.
pros: RiskProfiler provides a 360-degree view of our threat environment. Its ability to uncover exposed IPs, misconfigured assets, and third-party risks in real time is incredibly powerful. We particularly value the supply chain intelligence, which uses thousands of modules to identify threats within our vendor ecosystem—making third-party risk measurable and manageable.
cons: Setting up custom modules for specific use cases—like risk scoring for smaller vendors—required deeper configuration. While the flexibility is great, more built-in examples or guided templates would reduce time-to-insight. That said, the support team was responsive, and after the initial tuning, performance and precision were excellent.

review_title: A Powerful Threat Intelligence Platform for External Defence
description: We rely on RiskProfiler to identify exposed assets in real time, detect threat conversations around our brand, and secure our supply chain. The system helps us respond faster to attacks, automate compliance across frameworks, and continuously monitor third-party risks. It’s become essential in reducing operational risk and protecting our global brand presence.
author: Prabhas B.
pros: RiskProfiler delivers comprehensive, real-time visibility across our external digital assets, from IP-level discovery to geo-mapped threat profiling. The attack path analysis is particularly valuable, simulating real-life attack scenario from initial access to critical infrastructure. Combined with brand monitoring and multilingual tracking, it gives us unmatched situational awareness across the web.
cons: The platform’s extensive capabilities require an initial learning curve, especially for less mature teams. Some alert customizations and integrations take effort to fine-tune. However, once configured, it delivers significant security and operational value.

review_title: An unified Platform with Seamless integration to Stay Ahead of External Threats
description: RiskProfiler offers all external exposure related data in one platform. It presented all multi-cloud security information in one place. The risk detection is fast and efficient. We needed frequent support from them post the initial setup to understand the workings of this platform, and their team was a excellent with timely and detailed query response.
author: Aman T.
pros: RiskProfiler is a external threat exposure management platform that seemlessly integrated with our system and cloud environment. The service is quick to implement and setting up is completely guided. Their brand intelligence module is a standout in detecting phishing scams and impersonation attempts at real time. Overall, it was a good experience.
cons: Their dashboard is complicated and offer multitude of complex data. Now, it might be great for larger organization with security teams but posed a challenge for our team.

review_title: Actionable Third-Party Risk Monitoring with Dynamic Visibility and Reporting
description: RiskProfiler gives us continuous vendor risk visibility, with automatic scoring, fast questionnaires, and full security event tracking. It also highlights fourth-party risks we were blind to before, making our vendor ecosystem truly secure and our procurement process much smarter.
author: Tejas S.
pros: The third-party and fourth-party risk monitoring is incredibly robust. RiskProfiler alerts us in real time when a vendor’s security posture changes, and it automatically dispatches updated questionnaires. We no longer wait for quarterly reviews; we act on supplier risks as they happen, which has significantly improved our compliance and oversight.
cons: While the platform is highly intuitive, native language support for international vendor users is limited. Adding multilingual interfaces or translated guidance for third-party collaborators would enhance usability during questionnaire completion and streamline engagement with non-English-speaking partners during security event follow-ups.

review_title: Attack Surface Clarity That Drives Real Remediation
description: Our team struggled with unknown or untracked assets, leading to blind spots and unmanaged vulnerabilities. RiskProfiler solved this by automatically discovering digital assets across cloud and hybrid environments.
author: Gaurav B.
pros: RiskProfiler gives us full control over our external attack surface. It continuously discovers and monitors assets, domains, subdomains, cloud apps, IPs, and flags exposures in real time. The contextual insights tied to each asset help us prioritize remediation with clarity. Shadow IT visibility alone has saved us from repeated misconfigurations.
cons: A feature to flag assets by lifecycle status (e.g., deprecated, unknown, orphaned) using AI-based heuristics would help us clean up our inventory faster and reduce noise from non-critical endpoints.

review_title: A Dynamic Risk Map for AI-Driven Asset Intelligence
description: Deployment was lightweight and required no additional infrastructure. The navigation is intuitive enough that even non-technical teams can interpret the dashboards, while support remains highly responsive and technically thorough.
author: Yaakesh G.
pros: The external surface monitoring module uncovered rogue assets that our internal scanners consistently overlooked. Its ability to classify and group assets by exposure level allows us to build risk-prioritization models more effectively.
cons: I would like to see more automated remediation recommendations integrated into the workflow. While UI scalability is strong, the visualization layer could be better optimized for handling larger asset inventories.

review_title: Dark Web Monitoring That Actually Delivers Results
description: We’re alerted immediately when credentials, domains, or brands are mentioned. RiskProfiler has helped us take down phishing sites, secure accounts, and stay ahead of breach-related reputational risks.
author: Arvind Y.
pros: The dark web monitoring is proactive and incredibly detailed. It detects exposed credentials, brand mentions, executive targeting, and PII leaks with context we can act on. This capability alone helped us uncover a threat campaign before it escalated. We’ve stopped multiple breaches thanks to these timely alerts and insights.
cons: During heavy analysis sessions, we occasionally experience minor lagging or slower UI responsiveness.

review_title: One Platform for Total External Threat Coverage, Bridging the Silos and security Gaps
description: It has enabled continuous monitoring across vendors and subsidiaries, faster mitigation of high-risk exposures, and a more unified GRC posture.
author: Ranjan V.
pros: We liked how RiskProfiler breaks down silos. Whether it's brand protection, vulnerability exposure, vendor risk, or physical threats, everything is monitored, scored, and correlated automatically. The contextual insights, zero-false-positive detection, and fast reporting give our security and GRC teams a shared, real-time view of all critical threats and gaps.
cons: The review and approval process for compliance controls works well, but could benefit from more flexible workflow assignments.

review_title: from Asset Discovery to Dark Web Intelligence—This Platform Covers It All
description: RiskProfiler centralizes threat intelligence, giving us real-time context on every exposure. It has helped us harden our external perimeter, proactively defend our brand, and continuously monitor third-party threats
author: Rakesh R.
pros: RiskProfiler gives us full visibility into our exposed digital assets, including subdomains, IPs, and shadow IT. The platform’s rapid detection and contextual asset mapping let us prioritize critical risks fast. Having all this unified with phishing, vulnerability, and brand intelligence under one roof has streamlined our entire threat management workflow.
cons: A guided setup for alert calibration based on industry or company size would help newer teams reduce early-stage signal overload.

review_title: Making Vendor Security Measurable and Actionable Across Procurement
description: Overall, it changed vendor discussions. Suddenly, security wasn’t a checkbox but became part of procurement, backed with real evidence rather than guesswork.
author: Kanishk S.
pros: The third-party module impressed me with continuous risk scoring tied to live vendor activity. It wasn’t just about questionnaires; it connected real signals like dark web chatter with vendor exposure.
cons: Colleagues outside engineering found it difficult at first. Risk scores felt abstract until workshops explained how the numbers tied back to vendor weaknesses.
